name: Get Set GO! Early EARLY Access - FREE

reviews.review_description: The game is in the works so obviously theres parts they need to fix but the ideas the creativity and the fun you can have in this game with your friends is crazy, cant wait to see what this game has stored in the future

This game looks insanely fun and the graphics are good and overall a cool idea, but im stuck in the loading screen. It won't load, I waited for about an hour and a half and the loading bar didn't even move. I Uninstaller it like a thousand times, I restarted my headset a thousand time. I don't know what to do, devs please help!

developer_response.body:
yoooo thanks for letting us know! We submitted a patch this week that fixed the issue some users were experiencing so you should be able to get into the game if you update! 

Thanks for the feedback too we really appreciate it! We're doing our best to make an awesome game.

reviews.review_title: please read this devs and fix the glitch
reviews.review_description: The game is a lot of fun, but I ran into a really bad glitch so what’s happening is when I put the ramp on my car I can’t remove it at all even when I uninstalled it and reinstalled it just won’t disappear so now I’m just stuck with that and it made my car, not be able to do damage

developer_response.body: looking into the issue! we deploy fixes as often as we can and really appreciate the help pointing things like this out! we'll announce fixes in the discord when they're up!

reviews.review_description: I'm sorry to give this a bad review but from what I saw from the review of the trailer and everything I thought this game was going to be good it was okay that's why I'm not going to get one star but it's hard to use the physics are wonky and the server thing doesn't even work at the time and there's barely anything you would use to actually add thrusters or something it's just unfortunate

developer_response.body:
Understandable man really appreciate the feedback! We got a big update coming soon that’s going to add a lot of new props + improvements to our physics & progression. We launched into early access to have players help us figure out what is good about the game and what we need to work on so feedback like this is a huge help! 

We got a lot of work to do and we hope players like you will keep giving us a look as we go! 

-foundrey

reviews.review_description: there will be times when after you die and respawn, there will be there will be a bug that will make you fly up into the sky and stay on the ceiling and have to leave and rejoin. Also, there will be times where you cant drive. Its still fun th

developer_response.body: dude thank you for playing and we're really glad you had a good time! huge thanks for the heads up on bugs. we're deploying stability patches each week as we make new stuff and we really appreciate the help identifying new issues!

reviews.review_description: I played this game for a few minutes and was hooked. For early access this game is great. The amount of possibilites is endless! But as its in early access there are still bugs but really fun overall!

developer_response.body: yooooo thanks dude!! we'll keep doing our best to make the best game we can!

reviews.review_description:
the game is good but people keep on stealing my car and whenever i try to leave the lobby and they follow me through the portal 
i think that if another person tried to ride your car
 it just blows up

developer_response.body:
really appreciate the feedback and totally get it. there's a lot about the game right now that we want to improve and we'll keep working hard to do just that. 

we need to give players more ways to enjoy the game their way whether that's with other players, or more by themselves without having to jump through a bunch of hoops. same goes for stability. 

we deploy updates and patches each week so we hope you'll keep hopping in and see how things improve! 

huge thanks again. this kind of feedback is what we're here for and helps us make a better game!

reviews.review_description: I think this game is a great idea, the devs are very nice, overall a great game, I find it cool and fun.

developer_response.body: thank you thank you thank you thank youuuuuuuuuu!

reviews.review_title: One of the most creative and fun games
reviews.review_description: Love it its just so much fun the devs are helpful too. It's just one of the best games I ever played
U can make planes

reviews.review_title: Fun, Has Potential, Not Quite the
reviews.review_description: This game has serious potential however it needs Some of the Vehicle Builder Basics found in games like Trailmakers. But if it achieves these basics it would be fun to have a VR multiplayer Vehicle Builder

developer_response.body:
Dude thank you for the comparison they have an awesome game and we're doing our best to make a great vehicle-based game to bring to VR and bring something new along the way! 

New updates every week and we're bringing a lot of new fundamentals to the game each week as we build it out! 

Feedback like this is huge. It helps us figure out what will make GetSetGo better so we really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: Great movment system, amazing community and great dev devotion to the game! And cars which is awesome to Drift and build on.

developer_response.body: yoooo much appreciated juicyyy lesgooo

reviews.review_description: I love this game So So So much. It’s really worth giving a try trust me.

developer_response.body: thank you thank you!

reviews.review_description: Great game, huge potential and definitely a lot to work with. While I see the game getting better the more popular it gets, there are some issues that devs might want to hammer out before the full game releases. 1. Lag. Sometimes, usually in a large lobby, my screen freezes and the game gets stuck, some things don’t spawn in right away, and players can be launched into space (or the void of infinite falling). 2. Other players. Having multiplayer is awesome, but when I’m trying to spawn a car and get yeeted, or actually get one and end up being highjacked and ran over, it can get frustrating very fast. A few solutions could be private lobbies that only friends can join or be invited to or more building platforms or only one player be able to interact with a car at once. Aside from these, I have no complaints and hope to see this game go far!

developer_response.body:
Dude thank you so much for the in-depth review! 

To respond to each of your points: 

1. You're absolutely right. Performance is paramount in VR and we try to pride ourselves on good optimization, but we'll be the first to say with this new expansion there's a lot of room for improvement to say the least. We're not hitting the marks we want to hit and the players deserve and we're going to work as hard as we can to get it done. There's a few places with how we treat logging at the moment that tends to lag out lobbies at times so we're working on a patch to improve / eliminate those major lag spikes you can sometimes run into. On top of that we're rexamining the entire way we render to more effectively batch the game and ideally get that FPS up even in packed lobbies!

2. You're absolutely right here. GetSetGO! is a social game and we fundamentally enjoy the experience of seeing players mess around and collaborate together, but we could do a much better job of allowing the players to moderate their gameplay & making it so they don't need to all the time. We're actually working on a whole rework to the lobby design & new features like private lobbies & more moderation tools for your vehicle. 

Really appreciate the feedback and we'll keep doing our best to make this game the kind of experience you guys would love to come back to each day!

reviews.review_title: Bro they cooked on this game i love it
reviews.review_description: Bro they cooked it is so fun im not gonna lie bro i play it every single day bro they have to get me off from this game bro i love your game

developer_response.body: MUCH LOVE! Will keep cookin' in the lab!

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game, and it needs to be big. It just has a great concept and there is many ideas I have for it to be amazing. But just this starting off is a game I’ve never known I needed!

developer_response.body:
dude thank you! we're working really hard everyday to make this game as good as it can be so feedback like this means a lot. 

we've got a long way to go for our own standards and we can't thank you guys enough for enjoying what we've made along the way!

reviews.review_title: I want to build more cars!
reviews.review_description: whoever made the Supreme Brick car. Have them make more cars please. and please read my feedback on your discord! i have lots of ideas for great parts

developer_response.body: We're adding new vehicles every single week! Check out our dev posts to see the upcoming content

reviews.review_description: people keep taking the car i make and won't give it back fix this and add something to switch if you want friends or anyone else or just yourself to be in the car

developer_response.body: yeah we're actually working on a whole new way people can keep their car safe or at least more in their control if they want to. jumping on each other's cars and stuff is a big part of what makes the game fun for us, but there's definitely a lot of room for improvement for how we can moderate it so we really appreciate you letting us know! it's a massive help!

reviews.review_description: it's good because you're able to drive cars and and death animation is cool

developer_response.body: Appreciate it! We spent a lot of times making the cars drive in our own special Get Set GO! way

reviews.review_description: I built a a sky world like in gta 💰Try dueling with friends it’s so funny 🤣

developer_response.body: yoyo thanks Swaggy SohoSwag. Wait until you see our beta updates!

reviews.review_description: Can’t wait for them to add battling and saving cars

developer_response.body: COMING SOON!

developer_response.body: yoyo, Cub. Yeah, we're in early access and have schedule play sessions on weekends! We must have missed you! We'll be back on Saturday and Sunday 12 PM EST if you can join us. Hoping that will bump up your review to a 5 when we see you in Get Set GO!

reviews.review_description: i love game

developer_response.body: and we love you too
